name: XbotDep V1 Contact-Rich PC Case Assembly SOP

steps.description: Initialize empty chassis, material station, screw station, tool station, and both dexterous hands.
steps.physical_rule: The chassis must begin empty; parts, screws, and screwdriver must start at their stations.
steps.completion_standard: Hands open, tool in rack, all required parts uninstalled.

steps.description: Verify material station, screw station, tool station, and empty chassis.
steps.physical_rule: No assembly may start until stations are verified.
steps.completion_standard: All required materials and screws exist; screwdriver reachable.

steps.description: Right hand grasps screwdriver from tool station.
steps.physical_rule: The screwdriver must not move by itself; it must be carried by the right hand.
steps.completion_standard: Right hand holds screwdriver and fingers close around handle.

steps.description: Fetch and install motherboard tray bracket with right-hand manipulation and left-hand support.
steps.physical_rule: Bracket must come from material station and cannot appear inside the chassis directly.
steps.completion_standard: Bracket pose error within tolerance; installed but not yet fastened.

steps.description: Feed two screws from screw station and fasten motherboard tray bracket.
steps.physical_rule: Each screw must be picked from screw station before tightening.
steps.completion_standard: Two screws consumed; torque records within range.

steps.description: Fetch and install PSU bracket after tray bracket is fastened.
steps.physical_rule: PSU bracket follows tray bracket to avoid collision and access conflict.
steps.completion_standard: PSU bracket pose error within tolerance.

steps.description: Feed two screws and fasten PSU bracket.
steps.physical_rule: Left hand stabilizes chassis/part while right hand drives screwdriver.
steps.completion_standard: Two screws consumed; torque records within range.

steps.description: Bimanually fetch and install fan module.
steps.physical_rule: Fan is orientation-sensitive and must be handled with two-hand support.
steps.completion_standard: Fan pose error within tolerance before fastening.

steps.description: Feed four screws and fasten fan module.
steps.physical_rule: Left hand stabilizes fan frame while right hand drives screwdriver.
steps.completion_standard: Four fan screws consumed and torque checked.

steps.description: Install dust filter after fan module is fastened.
steps.physical_rule: Dust filter after fan; otherwise it blocks fan fastening access.
steps.completion_standard: Dust filter seated at intake target.

steps.description: Install front I/O panel before cable routing.
steps.physical_rule: Cable route depends on front I/O panel datum.
steps.completion_standard: Front I/O panel mounted and accessible.

steps.description: Route front I/O cable along guide path before closing front panel.
steps.physical_rule: Cable must be routed before front panel closure to avoid pinching.
steps.completion_standard: Cable follows route checkpoints and is registered installed.

steps.description: Bimanually align and install front panel.
steps.physical_rule: Front panel comes after internal front I/O and cable route.
steps.completion_standard: Front panel gap/pose error within cover tolerance.

steps.physical_rule: Top cover uses front panel datum and follows front panel seating.
steps.completion_standard: Top cover pose error within cover tolerance.

steps.description: Bimanually install left and right side covers.
steps.physical_rule: Side covers are installed after internal access is complete.
steps.completion_standard: Both side covers seated within cover tolerance.

steps.description: Feed four screws and fasten covers.
steps.physical_rule: Cover screws are tightened only after cover pose checks pass.
steps.completion_standard: Four cover screws consumed and torque checked.

steps.physical_rule: Tool cannot be left in chassis or suspended in space.
steps.completion_standard: Screwdriver back in tool rack and right hand empty.

steps.description: Check installed parts, screw count, torque records, cable route, and cover alignment.
steps.physical_rule: Case cannot move to output unless all quality gates pass.
steps.completion_standard: All parts installed, all required screws consumed, torque range valid, covers aligned.

steps.description: Bimanually transfer finished chassis to output zone.
steps.physical_rule: Both hands support the case during transfer.
steps.completion_standard: Case center is inside output zone; hands open and safe.
